title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Paints are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
